channel.title: MDES: DevZone API Updates
channel.description: Latest API updates, releases, and announcements

item.title: v2.3 Released – Tokenization Enhancement
item.description: Added support for new authentication profile and performance improvements.

item.title: Deprecation Notice – v1 APIs
item.description: v1 APIs will be sunset by Dec 2026. Migration guide available.

item.title: Deprecation Notice – v3 APIs
item.description: v1 APIs will be sunset by Dec 2026. Migration guide available.

item.title: Deprecation Notice – v4 APIs
item.description: v1 APIs will be sunset by Dec 2026. Migration guide available.
